scripts.build: dotnet build src/FilesPlusPlus.Core/FilesPlusPlus.Core.csproj -c Release && dotnet build src/FilesPlusPlus.App/FilesPlusPlus.App.csproj -c Release && dotnet build tests/FilesPlusPlus.Core.Tests/FilesPlusPlus.Core.Tests.csproj -c Release
scripts.build:vs: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\Tools\Launch-VsDevShell.ps1' -SkipAutomaticLocation; dotnet build src/FilesPlusPlus.Core/FilesPlusPlus.Core.csproj -c Release; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; dotnet build src/FilesPlusPlus.App/FilesPlusPlus.App.csproj -c Release; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; dotnet build tests/FilesPlusPlus.Core.Tests/FilesPlusPlus.Core.Tests.csproj -c Release"
scripts.test:vs: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\Tools\Launch-VsDevShell.ps1' -SkipAutomaticLocation; dotnet test tests/FilesPlusPlus.Core.Tests/FilesPlusPlus.Core.Tests.csproj -c Release"
scripts.pack:msix:vs: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\Tools\Launch-VsDevShell.ps1' -SkipAutomaticLocation; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-msix.ps1"
scripts.pack:msi:vs: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\Tools\Launch-VsDevShell.ps1' -SkipAutomaticLocation; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-msi.ps1"
scripts.pack:all: npm run pack:msix && npm run pack:msi
scripts.pack:all:vs: npm run pack:msix:vs && npm run pack:msi:vs
scripts.win-compiler:arm64: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoExit -Command "& 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\Tools\Launch-VsDevShell.ps1' -SkipAutomaticLocation -Arch arm64 -HostArch amd64"
